# New Horizon Villas

> Luxury stone-built cycladic villas in Fotimari, Kea (Tzia), Cyclades, Greece.
> One hour by ferry from Athens. 3 bedrooms, sleeps 6, infinity pool, panoramic Aegean views.
> Book direct: stay@newhorizonvillas.gr

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/): Property overview, amenities, unique selling points, booking CTA. Traditional xerolithia stone architecture, absolute seclusion, pet-friendly.
- [Explore Kea](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/explore): Island guide — beaches (Gialiskari Blue Flag 2 km, Otzias 5 km, Koundouros), restaurants (Aristos Vourkari marina, Philippos Grill Fotimari, Strofi tou Mimi), culture (Lion of Kea carved 600 BC, Ancient Karthea Doric temples, 81 km stone hiking trails, HMHS Britannic wreck diving at 120 m).
- [Location & Arrival](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/location): GPS coordinates 37.662572, 24.329075 · Fotimari village, Kea · Korissia port 3 km · Vourkari marina 1 km · Final 1.5 km is unpaved, SUV or 4×4 required · Ferry 1 hour from Lavrio port (50 km from Athens).
- [Book Direct](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/book): Direct booking preferred (best rate guarantee); also listed on Airbnb and Booking.com. WhatsApp contact available. Climate Crisis Resilience Fee €10–€15/night applicable per Greek law.

## Property Details

- Type: Vacation rental villa, cycladic stone architecture
- Location: Fotimari, Kea (Tzia), Cyclades, Greece
- Bedrooms: 3 | Capacity: 6 guests
- Amenities: Panoramic Aegean views, free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, free parking, private entrance, fully equipped kitchen, pet friendly
- Access: SUV/4×4 required for final 1.5 km unpaved road
- Ferry: Lavrio → Korissia (Kea), 1 hour, daily service
- Contact: stay@newhorizonvillas.gr

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/privacy): GDPR-compliant data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://emirsaffar-collab.github.io/New-Horizon/terms): Booking terms, cancellation policy, guest responsibilities
